meta.title: It's time to stop pretending Australia LOST the 'Great Emu War'
meta.description:
Download War Thunder for FREE and get your bonus! ► Use my link — https://playwt.link/sandboxx Thanks to War Thunder for sponsoring the video!

-- BREAK -- 

When it comes to the meme-ification of military stories, there's one that reigns silliest of all: The idea that Australia LOST a war to Emus (large, flightless birds) back in the 1930s. This meme is so pervasive that even many people in Australia have come to believe it... but in reality, Australia definitely won this conflict. 

So let's talk about what really happened in Western Australia back in the 1930s, how Australia defeated these living dinosaurs for good, and why the Great Emu War charade is a cautionary tale about media literacy in the modern era.
